category_sources: source_facts.description says interactive 3D viewing program; SourceForge official project categorizes it as 3D Rendering, Data Visualization, and Mathematics.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project title is Geomview; source_facts.name is geomview.
docs_sources: Official Geomview manual states the manual and software are available from geomview.org; PDF is hosted under the official geomview.sourceforge.io project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge Geomview project exposes a Code tab for project source control.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies 3D viewing; official SourceForge project notes OpenGL, Motif/X11 UI, Unix support, and data visualization/mathematics categories.
